decision.summary: Hold the near-certain 69k No position into resolution and do not open any new BTC market position.
decision.rationale: Live Polymarket shows one open position: No on 'Will Bitcoin reach $69,000 on March 27?' at 99.4% probability with expiry near 04:00Z, while Binance spot is 66360.98 and still well below 69k; under the playbook’s take-profit exception, this is near-certain enough to hold rather than close early. The latest Beecthor transcript and 2026-03-27 summary keep the thesis bearish overall, but still allow a tactical rebound toward 68k-69.5k/70k before further downside to 62.7k or 59k if 65k fails. For new entries, nearest-strike-first points to the 65k dip market, but its Yes probability is only 1.25%, below the 50% minimum, while the expensive No sides are already too aggressively priced and do not offer a clean edge against the remaining rebound/flush uncertainty.
